code: set.seed(2031) linked_zoom_points <- data.frame(   x = c(rnorm(900, -0.7, 0.28), rnorm(700, 0.85, 0.2), rnorm(600, 0.1, 0.18)),   y = c(rnorm(900, 0.0, 0.2), rnorm(700, 0.55, 0.16), rnorm(600, -0.7, 0.12)),   group = rep(c("global", "local", "bridge"), c(900, 700, 600)) )  linked_zoom_source <- ggwebgl_spec(   layers = list(     ggwebgl_layer_points(       linked_zoom_points,       x = "x",       y = "y",       colour = c("#2563eb", "#f97316", "#0f766e")[match(linked_zoom_points$group, c("global", "local", "bridge"))],       alpha = 0.36,       size = 2.2     )   ),   labels = list(title = "Interactive linked zoom"),   webgl = list(shader = "density_splat", interactions = character()) )  linked_zoom_spec <- ggwebgl_magnify_region(   linked_zoom_source,   region = list(x = c(0.48, 1.25), y = c(0.25, 0.82)),   display = "panel",   interactive = TRUE,   global_label = "Global view",   zoom_label = "Brush-driven zoom" )  linked_zoom_spec$render$links$magnifiers[[1L]] #> $source_panel #> [1] "global" #>  #> $target_panel #> [1] "local" #>  #> $region #> $region$x #> [1] 0.48 1.25 #>  #> $region$y #> [1] 0.25 0.82 ggWebGL(linked_zoom_spec, height = 430)

Reserved future backend-specific options.

title: ggWebGL 0.4.0
text: Froze experimental renderer API around structured ggwebgl_view(), ggwebgl_selection(), ggwebgl_material() contracts. Extended vector layers support 3D z/zend coordinates preserving renderer-owned ids, frame/time metadata, browser selection behavior. Added distinct orbit trackball camera control paths normalized rotation-based camera state. Upgraded mesh surface payloads generated normals, Lambert material metadata, picking ids, wireframe/culling controls, GPU payload caching hooks. Expanded interaction-frame benchmark artifact schema fixed frame-rate performance statements require device, browser, GPU, commit, primitive-count, artifact metadata. Added guarded optional downstream boids4R animation vignette htmlwidget example render renderer-neutral swarm frames exact-timeline point vector primitives. examples keep boids4R optional development ecosystem package avoid attaching namespace ggWebGL tests. Reframed optional boids4R documentation browser-native swarm art, clarifying boids4R owns simulation semantics ggWebGL owns WebGL rendering timeline interaction. Prepared CRAN self-containment removing GitHub-ecosystem packages DESCRIPTION, gating live optional bridge vignettes behind explicit development environment variable, documenting XGeoRTR, boids4R, shapViz3D optional integrations rather installation requirements.

title: ggWebGL 0.3.0
text: Added exported ggwebgl_magnify_region() R/magnify-region.R, panel inset modes driven exact data-coordinate rectangle. Added experimental vector-arrow rendering geom_vector_webgl() ggwebgl_layer_vectors(), using renderer-ready shafts triangle arrowheads without backend-specific semantics. Added experimental brush lasso interaction modes emit selected primitive ids Shiny inputs optional JavaScript callbacks. Added experimental timeline controls frame/time filtering primitive layers plus play, scrub, speed, reset UI controls. Added experimental opt-3D camera state, 3D point/line support, indexed mesh payloads, geom_mesh_webgl(), geom_surface_webgl(), ggwebgl_layer_mesh(), ggwebgl_layer_surface(). Added renderer-generic future-work gallery contract tests covering new vector, selection, timeline, camera, mesh, surface paths. Added interaction-frame benchmark schema frame-rate statements. Fixed performance numbers remain future-facing generated benchmark artifacts exist named target machine.

title: ggWebGL 0.2.0
text: Promoted package long-running development scaffold 0.2.0 release line. Added large-scene demo support: persistent point buffers stable large point-cloud interaction, deterministic count-aware density splats, generic hover labels point primitives, reproducible renderer gallery. Added generic downstream adapter helpers renderer-ready point, line, raster primitive specs, including exported ggwebgl_layer_*() constructors ggwebgl_spec(). Added package-owned static export surfaces snapshot_ggwebgl() compose_ggwebgl_figure(), publication-style PNG/JPEG captures simple figure composition can driven package API instead ad hoc scripts. Added project evidence documentation machine-readable evidence summaries internal release validation. Added vignette-local figure copies website articles need images without referencing files outside pkgdownâ€™s allowed article asset paths. Tightened browser-backed static export path around dedicated chromote browser ownership, lighter examples, explicit optional dependency declarations export vignette tooling. Fixed pkgdown/htmlwidget layout containment restoring widget CSS dependency adding inline canvas-stage safeguards, preventing WebGL canvases stacking top article pages.

title: ggWebGL 0.1.0
text: Expanded core renderer beyond initial scaffold reusable showcase helpers, manual htmlwidget Shiny smoke tests, stronger pkgdown-facing documentation surface. Implemented stabilized main point shader modes: default, density_splat, trajectory_age, trajectory_age_glow. Added hover-based sample inspection top existing pan zoom interactions. Added texture-backed raster rendering geom_raster_webgl(). Added fixed-scale facet_wrap() facet_grid() support panel-aware render specification panel-local interaction state. Added packaged real-data evidence examples covering raster fields, storm trajectories, dense embeddings. Added reproducible evaluation suite ggplot2 plotly, including machine-readable metrics benchmark figure scripts inst/benchmarks/. Froze XGeoRTR/ggWebGL renderer boundary RENDERER_CONTRACT.md added first as_ggwebgl_spec.xgeo_state() adapter plus renderer contract tests.

title: ggWebGL 0.0.0.9000
text: Reset package metadata top-level documentation copied scaffold ggWebGL package identity. Rewrote package README, citation, pkgdown configuration around intended ggplot2 plus WebGL rendering workflow companion-package split. Removed imported carryover benchmark content copied package tree. Added first real ggplot_webgl() renderer path point line layers, backed minimal WebGL htmlwidget. Added initial showcase vignette gallery, including dense latent-space, diffusion-trajectory, phase-portrait, optimization-path examples. Added reusable standard high_detail showcase presets gallery demo surfaces.
